title: Customize automation for integration
excerpt: I wonder is it possible to code and automation to exisitng integration. For example, Monday integrates with Survey Monkey but they only offer two automations. I want to figure out if I can build special ones…

posts.author: YCPan (YC Pan)
posts.cookedHtml: I wonder is it possible to code and automation to exisitng integration. For example, Monday integrates with Survey Monkey but they only offer two automations. I want to figure out if I can build special ones…

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YCPan ,

Yes, it is possible to create custom automations for existing integrations, such as Monday’s integration with Survey Monkey.

If you’re not comfortable and require more advanced functionality,you can explore Make.

With Make, you can build complex workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and streamline your processes by connecting Monday and Survey Monkey in unique ways.
